query: I want a 4-day Amsterdam trip next month for a couple, mid-range budget, close to museums and public transport, with a canal cruise and one day trip.
notes: Classic Amsterdam couple trip with cultural focus.

query: Paris for 5 days with my family of four (two kids aged 8 and 11). Looking for family-friendly hotels, easy metro access, Louvre, Eiffel Tower, and maybe a Versailles day trip. Mid-range budget.
notes: Family trip with kids, needs family-friendly options.

query: Barcelona solo trip, 3 days, budget traveller. I love architecture, food markets, and nightlife. Any neighbourhood near the Gothic Quarter or El Born.
notes: Budget solo traveller focused on food and architecture.

query: Rome honeymoon trip, 6 days, luxury budget. We want romantic dinners, private tours of the Colosseum, Borghese Gallery, and a day trip to Pompeii. Nothing too touristy.
Lisbon in April for 4 days, two adults, mid-range. We want fado, local food, Alfama, Sintra day trip, and to feel like locals rather than tourists.
3-day Amsterdam trip for a group of 6 friends, we want to party, see some museums during the day, and stay somewhere central. Upper mid-range budget.
notes: Group trip with dual focus on culture and nightlife.

query: Business trip to Paris, 2 nights, need to be near transport and have good wifi and a proper workspace. Upper mid-range. Flying in Monday morning, out Wednesday evening.
Barcelona for 7 days, couple, mix of beach and culture, food-obsessed, relaxed itinerary. Mid to upper-mid budget. We love architecture and would like a day trip somewhere.
Lisbon budget trip for one, 5 days. I'm a solo female traveller who wants safe neighbourhood, good fado, seafood, and Sintra. Max 60 euros per day all-in if possible.
notes: Budget solo female traveller with safety concern.

query: Rome with elderly parents, 4 days, comfortable pace, nothing too strenuous. They want the Vatican, Trevi Fountain, good Italian food, and ideally a nice hotel near the centre. Mid-range.
notes: Trip with elderly travellers, comfort and pace are key.
